problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Two-dimensional. Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
